phrase: I am from the United States

translations.en: I am from the United States

phrase: How long have you been here?

translations.en: How long have you been here?
translations.fr: Depuis combien de temps es-tu ici ?

phrase: I have lived here for one year

translations.es: Vivo aquí desde hace un año
translations.en: I have lived here for one year

translations.it: Mi sono trasferito qui di recente

translations.fr: Je suis ici pour le travail

phrase: It is my first time here

translations.en: It is my first time here
translations.it: È la mia prima volta qui

translations.fr: Je ne suis pas d'accord avec toi
Je suis tout à fait d'accord
Je ne suis pas tout à fait d'accord

phrase: I don't see it that way

translations.en: I don't see it that way
translations.fr: Je ne le vois pas comme ça

phrase: I am not on your side

translations.en: I am not on your side
translations.fr: Je ne suis pas de ton côté

phrase: — What did you do yesterday? — Not much, I was working all day

translations.es: — ¿Qué hiciste ayer? — Pues nada, estuve trabajando todo el día
translations.en: — What did you do yesterday? — Not much, I was working all day
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu as fait hier ? — Pas grand-chose, j'ai travaillé toute la journée
translations.it: — Cosa hai fatto ieri? — Niente di che, ho lavorato tutto il giorno

phrase: — Did you like it? — Yeah, but I expected more

translations.en: — Did you like it? — Yeah, but I expected more
translations.fr: — Ça t'a plu ? — Oui, mais je m'attendais à mieux
translations.it: — Ti è piaciuto? — Sì, ma mi aspettavo di più

phrase: — What do you think? — It depends how you see it

translations.es: — ¿Qué opinas? — Depende de cómo lo veas
translations.en: — What do you think? — It depends how you see it
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu en penses ? — Ça dépend comment tu vois les choses
translations.it: — Cosa ne pensi? — Dipende da come la vedi

phrase: — Is it worth it? — Honestly, not really

translations.es: — ¿Vale la pena? — La verdad, no mucho
translations.en: — Is it worth it? — Honestly, not really
translations.fr: — Ça vaut le coup ? — Honnêtement, pas vraiment
translations.it: — Ne vale la pena? — Onestamente, non molto

phrase: — What happened? — Nothing, it was a misunderstanding

translations.en: — What happened? — Nothing, it was a misunderstanding
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce qui s'est passé ? — Rien, c'était un malentendu
translations.it: — Cosa è successo? — Niente, è stato un malinteso

phrase: — Why did you do it? — Because I had no other choice

translations.es: — ¿Por qué lo hiciste? — Porque no tenía otra opción
translations.en: — Why did you do it? — Because I had no other choice
translations.fr: — Pourquoi tu l'as fait ? — Parce que je n'avais pas le choix
translations.it: — Perché l'hai fatto? — Perché non avevo altra scelta

phrase: — Are you sure? — More or less

translations.en: — Are you sure? — More or less
translations.fr: — Tu es sûr ? — Plus ou moins

phrase: — Are you coming or what? — Yeah, I'm on my way

translations.en: — Are you coming or what? — Yeah, I'm on my way
translations.fr: — Tu viens ou quoi ? — Oui, j'arrive
translations.it: — Vieni o no? — Sì, sto arrivando

phrase: — What do you mean? — That it's not that easy

translations.es: — ¿Qué quieres decir? — Que no es tan fácil
translations.en: — What do you mean? — That it's not that easy
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu veux dire ? — Que ce n'est pas si simple
translations.it: — Cosa vuoi dire? — Che non è così facile

translations.fr: — Tout va bien ? — Oui, tout va bien
translations.it: — Tutto bene? — Sì, tutto a posto

phrase: — What would you do? — I'd think twice

translations.es: — ¿Qué harías tú? — Yo lo pensaría dos veces
translations.en: — What would you do? — I'd think twice
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu ferais ? — J'y réfléchirais à deux fois
translations.it: — Cosa faresti? — Ci penserei due volte

phrase: — Sounds good? — Sounds good to me

translations.en: — Sounds good? — Sounds good to me
translations.fr: — Ça te va ? — Ça me va
translations.it: — Ti va bene? — Per me va bene

phrase: — How was it? — Better than I expected

translations.es: — ¿Qué tal estuvo? — Mejor de lo que esperaba
translations.en: — How was it? — Better than I expected
translations.fr: — C'était comment ? — Mieux que ce que j'attendais
translations.it: — Com'è stato? — Meglio di quanto mi aspettassi

phrase: — Would you do it again? — Without thinking twice

translations.en: — Would you do it again? — Without thinking twice
translations.it: — Lo rifaresti? — Senza pensarci due volte

phrase: — What do you think about that? — I'm not very convinced

translations.es: — ¿Qué opinas de eso? — No estoy muy convencido
translations.en: — What do you think about that? — I'm not very convinced
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu en penses ? — Je ne suis pas très convaincu
translations.it: — Cosa ne pensi? — Non sono molto convinto

phrase: — What do you want to do? — Whatever you prefer

translations.es: — ¿Qué quieres hacer? — Lo que tú prefieras
translations.en: — What do you want to do? — Whatever you prefer
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu veux faire ? — Ce que tu préfères
translations.it: — Cosa vuoi fare? — Quello che preferisci

phrase: — Are you in? — Yeah, let's go

translations.en: — Are you in? — Yeah, let's go
translations.fr: — T'es partant ? — Allez, on y va

phrase: — What do you think? — It makes sense

translations.en: — What do you think? — It makes sense
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu en penses ? — C'est logique
